zh.lifeSummary: 當John Knightley於1393年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Knightley29歲，母親Joan De Chillington25歲。他於大約1418年與Margaret Lewknor在根西島卡拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1431年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Knightley于1393年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Knightley29岁，母亲Joan De Chillington25岁。他于大约1418年与Margaret Lewknor在根西岛卡拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1431年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Knightley was born in 1393, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Knightley, was 29 and his mother, Joan De Chillington, was 25. He married Margaret Lewknor about 1418, in Calais, Guernsey. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1431, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Knightley est né en 1393, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Knightley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan De Chillington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lewknor environ 1418, à Calais, Guernesey. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1431, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Knightley 1393 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Knightley 29 und seine Mutter Joan De Chillington 25. Er hat um 1418 in Calais, Guernsey Margaret Lewknor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1431 im Alter von 38 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Knightley è nato il nel 1393 nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Knightley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Chillington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Lewknor circa 1418, nel Calais, Guernsey. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1431, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Knightleyが1393年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Knightleyは29歳，母Joan De Chillingtonは25歳であった。約1418年にガーンジーカレイスでMargaret Lewknorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Knightley(이)가 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Knightley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Chillington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1418년 건지 캘레이에서 Margaret Lewknor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Knightley nasceu em 1393, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Knightley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Chillington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Lewknor aproximadamente 1418, em Calais, Guernsey. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1431, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Knightley родился в 1393 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Knightley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Chillington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lewknor около 1418 г. в местности калеи, Гернси. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1431 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Lewknor aproximadamente 1418, en Calais, Guernsey. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
